name: wikijs-citizen-styles
description: A pure-white themed custom override CSS for Wiki.js.

scripts.build-css: sass src/styles.scss dist/styles.css --no-source-map --style=compressed && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const file='dist/styles.css';const css=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8').replace(/^@charset \"UTF-8\";/,'');fs.writeFileSync(file,'@charset \"UTF-8\";'+css);"

author: AurLemon
